title: 100 Pcs Hose Clips Adjustable 8-44mm Range, Stainless Steel Hose Clamps Assorted Kit, Water Pipe Clamps Clips Assorted with Screwdriver for Gas Automobile Pipe
features: 【Premium Material】The hose clips are made of outstanding stainless steel material with smooth edges and high strength, which is rust-resistance, corrosion-resistance, the sturdy and durable material will ensure long-lasting work.

【Easy to Use】The hose pipe clamps clips adopts a back buckle design to connect the stainless steel hose clips belt reliably. The diameter of the throat hoop can be adjusted to accurately apply the sealing pressure.

【Easy to Install】Just uses the equipped screwdriver to loosen the screw of jubilee clips. An then thread the pipe through the clips and adjust the size to fitting your hose's size. Finally, tighten the screws.

【Wide Applications】Hose clamp kit is flexible with a wide adjustable size range from 8 to 44mm. Apply to securing hoses, pipe, cable, tube, fuel lines in-home applications, automotive, industrial, boat or marine, etc.

【What You Will Get】You will receive 20 pcs 8-12 mm, 15 pcs 9-16 mm, 15 pcs 13-19 mm, 10 pcs 16-25 mm, 10 pcs 19-29 mm, 10 pcs 22-32 mm, 10 pcs 25-38 mm, 10 pcs 21-44 mm, a total of 100 pcs, and one z-shaped screwdriver.
description: Product Description The hose clips are made of outstanding stainless steel material with high strength, which is rust-resistant, and corrosion-resistant, the sturdy and durable material will ensure long-lasting work.
